/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/mini_ppti.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mini_ppti.dir/src/ckks_runner.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mini_ppti.dir/src/profiler.cpp.o -o mini_ppti   -L/usr/local/lib  -L/opt/homebrew/opt/libomp/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib:/opt/homebrew/opt/libomp/lib /usr/local/lib/libOPENFHEpke.so.1.5.0 /usr/local/lib/libOPENFHEbinfhe.so.1.5.0 /usr/local/lib/libOPENFHEcore.so.1.5.0 -fopenmp -ldl /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/13/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a
